title: React Developer Needed for Dashboard Project
description: We need an experienced React developer to build an admin dashboard. The project involves creating interactive charts, data tables, and user management features. Must have experience with REST APIs and modern React hooks. Budget is fixed, timeline is 2-3 weeks.

title: Python Backend Developer for API Integration
description: Looking for a Python developer to build REST APIs using FastAPI or Django. Need someone to integrate third-party APIs, handle authentication, and set up a PostgreSQL database. Experience with Docker is a plus.

title: WordPress Website Redesign
description: Need a WordPress expert to redesign our company website. Must have experience with Elementor and WooCommerce. PHP knowledge required.
